mapper.select: SELECT permission_detail.id ,permission_detail.target ,permission_detail.func FROM permission, permission_user, permission_detail WHERE permission.id = permission_user.permission_id AND permission.id = permission_detail.permission_id AND permission_user.user_id = #{userId} AND permission_detail.target = #{target} AND permission_detail.func = #{func} AND permission_user.deleted = false AND permission_detail.deleted = false AND permission.deleted = false

SELECT permission_detail.id , permission_detail.deleted , permission_detail.created_at as createdAt , permission_detail.modified_at as modifiedAt
, permission_detail.permission_id as permissionId , permission_detail.target , permission_detail.func FROM permission_detail WHERE permission_detail.id = #{id}
SELECT count(permission_detail.id) as listsize FROM permission_detail

SELECT permission_detail.id FROM permission_detail
ORDER BY permission_detail.id ORDER BY permission_detail.title DESC ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{perpage}

SELECT permission_detail.id FROM permission_detail
AND #{mark} > permission_detail.id ORDER BY permission_detail.id DESC
AND permission_detail.id > #{mark} ORDER BY permission_detail.id ASC
AND #{mark} > CONCAT(permission_detail.title, '_', permission_detail.id) ORDER BY permission_detail.title DESC
AND CONCAT(permission_detail.title, '_', permission_detail.id) > #{mark} ORDER BY permission_detail.title ASC
LIMIT 0, #{perpage}
